message:
refactor(backup): simplify default_backup_path, derive Default, idiomatic patterns

- Change default_backup_path() return type from Result<PathBuf> to
  PathBuf since it's infallible (no error path possible)
- Replace manual Default impl for ImportOptions with #[derive(Default)]
  since all fields use their type defaults (false for bool)
- Use .map_or(0, ...) instead of .map(...).unwrap_or(0) for db_size
- Replace .filter_map(|r| r.ok()) with .filter_map(Result::ok)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
